text:
tota        2010-07-28 14:27:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese             Makefile 
  Added files:
    japanese/asterisk16-sounds Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
    japanese/asterisk16-sounds/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  - Add a new port japanese/asterisk16-sounds
  
    This is a port of Japanese sound files for Asterisk 1.6.
    Under the restriction of using Asterisk(tm) The Open Source PBX only,
    you can use them royalty-free.
  
  PR:             ports/139448
  Submitted by:   TAKAHASHI Kaoru <kaoru_AT_kaisei_DOT_org>
